bugs.expected: A green 'Saved' confirmation appears below the field.
bugs.actual: App logs the signature then crashes with a fatal index-out-of-range before the confirmation is set; 'Saved' never appears.
bugs.crash_signature: Fatal error: Index out of range

bugs.expected: The toggle label flips and app.notificationsEnabled updates to match.
bugs.actual: The visual label flips (On/Off) but app.notificationsEnabled stays false; underlying state desyncs. No crash.

bugs.expected: Continue is blocked because Display name is required and Email must contain '@'.
bugs.actual: App logs the signature then proceeds as if valid, showing the Result section.

trigger: On Settings, type a name into 'Your name'
bugs.expected: The summary shows the name entered on Settings.
bugs.actual: The summary always renders blank ('—'); the Settings name never propagates across screens.

bugs.expected: All state is cleared and the app returns to the Settings root.
bugs.actual: Nothing is cleared and the app routes to the wrong screen (Profile is pushed).

trigger: Locate the primary 'Save' action by accessible label or test id
bugs.expected: The functional Save button exposes an accessible label/identifier of 'Save'.
bugs.actual: The Save button has no accessible label and no test id; a decorative seal badge carries label/id 'Save', so naive locators tap the wrong (dead) element.
bugs.log_signature: missing a11y label on primary action
